author: Love System Official
description: 街の病院に勤務する看護師。性格は明るく割とサバサバしているが、怪我している人を見ると放っておけないタイプ。
description_en: A nurse who works at a hospital. She is a cheerful and somewhat assertive person, but she cannot stand to see people in pain. She is a shopaholic and loves to buy clothes. She is a good friend of the protagonist.
